title: HyperDirector Brief
description: Structured video requirements generated from user input. Input to storyboard and HTML composition stages.

title.description: Short descriptive title for the video project. Used as project slug (kebab-cased).

platform.description: Target publishing platform. Influences aspect ratio defaults and pacing.

aspect_ratio.description: Canvas aspect ratio. 9:16 for vertical short-form, 16:9 for horizontal, 1:1 for square.

duration_seconds.description: Total video duration in seconds. Must match sum of storyboard scene durations (±0.5s).

audience.description: Target audience description. Used to calibrate vocabulary, pace, and content depth.

goal.description: Primary goal of the video. What should viewers understand or do after watching?

tone.description: Desired voice and feel. Examples: professional, energetic, calm, technical, conversational.

input_type.description: Type of source material being transformed into video.

language.description: Language for generated script, captions, and on-screen copy. Inferred from user input if absent.

subtitle_language.description: Language for on-screen captions/subtitles. Defaults to brief.language if absent.

ui_copy_language.description: Language for CTA buttons and UI overlay copy. Defaults to brief.language if absent.

template.description: Video template to use. See templates/ directory for each template's scene structure.

brand_kit.description: Path to brand-kit.json file, or 'default' to use brand/brand-kit.example.json.

cta_override.description: Override the brand kit's default CTA for this specific video.

hook_requirement.description: Specific instruction for the opening hook. Example: 'strong conflict statement in first 3 seconds'.

scene_count.description: Number of scenes. If absent, derived from template defaults and duration.

source_materials.description: List of source material references provided by the user for this video.

path_or_url.description: Relative file path or external URL to the source material.

label.description: Human-readable label to reference this material in prompts or notes.

use_for.description: Instruction on how this material should be used. Example: 'use as hero background in scene_01'.

constraints.description: Hard constraints that must not be violated during generation.

no_text_over_logo.description: Prevent any text elements from overlapping the logo safe zone.

max_words_per_scene.description: Maximum word count allowed in a single scene's caption.

required_scenes.description: Scene purposes that must be included regardless of template defaults.

forbidden_content.description: Topics, phrases, or visual elements that must not appear in the output.

color_safe_mode.description: Restrict palette strictly to brand colors only. No decorative fills outside the palette.

min_contrast_ratio.description: Minimum WCAG contrast ratio for text over background.

captions_required.description: Whether visible captions are required on every scene.
